message:
feat(sentry): add get/enable/disable alert rule operations

Add 3 new operations: get_alert_rule (single rule by ID), enable_alert_rule
(set status to active), disable_alert_rule (set status to disabled). Sentry
connector now has 29 operations. All 58 tests pass, golden vectors verified.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"

+[provides.operations."sentry.disable_alert_rule".input_schema]

+    "project_slug",
+    "rule_id",

+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."sentry.disable_alert_rule".input_schema.properties.organization_slug]
+description = "Sentry organization slug"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."sentry.disable_alert_rule".input_schema.properties.project_slug]

+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 3
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000

+[provides.operations."sentry.disable_alert_rule".ai_hints]

+examples = ['{"organization_slug": "my-org", "project_slug": "backend", "rule_id": "12345"}']

+
 [provides.operations."sentry.delete_issue"]
 description = "Permanently delete a Sentry issue and all its events (irreversible)"
 capability = "sentry.admin"
@@ -2159,6 +2361,9 @@ scope = "instance"
 "sentry.list_alert_rules" = ["sentry.read"]
 "sentry.list_issues" = ["sentry.read"]
 "sentry.delete_alert_rule" = ["sentry.admin"]
+"sentry.get_alert_rule" = ["sentry.alerts"]
+"sentry.enable_alert_rule" = ["sentry.alerts"]
+"sentry.disable_alert_rule" = ["sentry.alerts"]

@@ -620,6 +620,45 @@ impl SentryClient {
         self.delete(&format!("/projects/{org}/{project}/rules/{rule_id}/"))
             .await
     }
+
+    /// Get a single alert rule by ID.
+    pub async fn get_alert_rule(
+        &self,
+        org: &str,
+        project: &str,
+        rule_id: &str,
+    ) -> SentryResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.get(&format!("/projects/{org}/{project}/rules/{rule_id}/"))
+            .await
+    }
+
+    /// Enable an alert rule.
+    pub async fn enable_alert_rule(
+        &self,
+        org: &str,
+        project: &str,
+        rule_id: &str,
+    ) -> SentryResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.put(
+            &format!("/projects/{org}/{project}/rules/{rule_id}/"),
+            &serde_json::json!({"status": "active"}),
+        )
+        .await
+    }
+
+    /// Disable an alert rule.
+    pub async fn disable_alert_rule(
+        &self,
+        org: &str,
+        project: &str,
+        rule_id: &str,
+    ) -> SentryResult<serde_json::Value> {
+        self.put(
+            &format!("/projects/{org}/{project}/rules/{rule_id}/"),
+            &serde_json::json!({"status": "disabled"}),
+        )
+        .await
+    }
 }
 
 /// Minimal URL encoding for version strings.
